# Data Farm

> AI-powered SaaS platform that turns messy business data into clean, actionable intelligence.

## What is Data Farm?

Data Farm connects CSV files, PDFs, databases, and cloud data warehouses — then uses AI to clean, transform, and unify everything. Users can ask questions about their data in plain English and get shareable dashboards in seconds.

## Core Features

- **AI Data Cleaning**: Automatically detect and fix data quality issues — missing values, duplicates, type mismatches, outliers — with AI-suggested corrections.
- **Interactive Dashboards**: Generate and share visual dashboards from any dataset with charts, KPIs, and data tables.
- **Conversational Analytics**: Ask questions about your data in natural language and get instant answers powered by AI.
- **Universal Connectors**: Import data from CSV, PDF, Excel, JSON, PowerPoint, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and cloud warehouses.
- **Data Quality Reports**: Get comprehensive quality assessments with severity ratings and one-click fixes.
- **Knowledge Graph**: Automatically extract entities and relationships across datasets.

## Status

Data Farm is currently in pre-launch. Join the waitlist at https://datafarm-landing.vercel.app/ for early access.

## Links

- Website: https://datafarm-landing.vercel.app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/mattramos66/datafarm-landing
